name: 向日葵远程控制
description: 通过命令行管理远端设备，实时监测在线状态、秒级发起远程控制、快速传输文件及远程截屏。零部署、免更新，轻松实现智能批量运维。
description_en: Manage remote devices via CLI: monitor online status in real time, initiate remote control instantly, transfer files quickly, and capture remote screenshots. Zero deployment, no updates, enabling smart batch operations with ease.
examples_zh: 使用向日葵帮我列出所有在线设备，按设备名称、在线状态和最后上线时间整理成表格
使用向日葵帮我把办公电脑设备上的 D:\test.txt 下载到本地桌面
使用向日葵帮我建立办公电脑设备的CMD远程连接，运行 ipconfig 和 tasklist 检查网络和进程情况
使用向日葵帮我把办公电脑设备的 3000 端口映射到本地 18000，我要访问远程的 Web 服务
使用向日葵帮我给办公电脑屏幕截图，保存到本地桌面，看看远程桌面当前的状态
使用向日葵帮我把办公电脑重启一下，重启前先告诉我它的在线状态
examples_en: Use AweSun to list all online devices with their name, status, and last online time in a table
Use AweSun to download D:\test.txt from my office PC to my local desktop
Use AweSun to establish a CMD remote connection to my office PC, run ipconfig and tasklist to check network and process status
Use AweSun to forward port 3000 from my office PC to local port 18000 so I can access the remote web service
Use AweSun to take a screenshot of my office PC desktop and save it locally to check its current state
Use AweSun to restart my office PC, but show me its online status before rebooting
